/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main_scene.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libmain_scene.so -o libmain_scene.so CMakeFiles/main_scene.dir/include/scene/scene.cpp.o   -L/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rodrigo/Libraries/pcl1.15.0/lib:/home/rodrigo/Ros2_cam_lidar_calibration/CamLidarApplication/build:/home/rodrigo/Ros2_cam_lidar_calibration/CamLidarApplication/build/glfw/src liblidar_scan.so libgrid.so libutility.so libtexture_loader.so libcamera.so libmesh.so libmodel.so glfw/src/libglfw.so.3.5 /usr/lib64/libfreetype.so libImGuizmo.so libglad.so libshader.so /usr/lib64/libGLX.so /usr/lib64/libOpenGL.so libimgui.so
